route_mj_hidden.note: M/J分流在第六部选择中累积，此路由做最终判定后统一进入e_agency_launch，byRoute根据mj值决定后续链路

route_love_hidden.description: 第七部爱/习惯隐藏判定

rules.condition: antLightSeen === true && antFragileSeen === true && loveNotHabit >= 3 && control <= 2
rules.label: TRUE/GOOD资格池

ending_resolver.description: 结局判定路由器，根据GameState评估endings.json的judgement规则
ending_resolver.note: 按bad→true→good→normal优先级匹配，跳转对应ending node

rules.condition: path === 'bad' || badLock === true || distance >= 6 || (control >= 5 && (nagiDiscomfortSeed === true || nagiRebel === true))
rules.label: BAD END

rules.condition: path === 'dream' && antCompress === false && witnessFlag === true && personalHonor === true && nagiNameIndependent === true && control <= 2 && distance <= 3
rules.label: TRUE END
